title: Netra Eye Institute | Holistic & Integrative Eye Care
heading: Vision - Your most important sense. Don’t lose it.
description: Netra Eye Institute provides holistic and integrative eye care using Ayurveda and acupuncture to support retinal, corneal and neurodegenerative conditions.

What Our Patients Say “I recently completed my three weeks of wellness therapy at Netra Eye Institute and I am already seeing major improvements with the reduction in my eye prescription correction numbers. Netra Eye Institute is not just a well equipped clinic but is also backed up by professional and patient-caring staff. Thank you Dr. Gandapodi for your services and care.” Sarang New Jersey, USA “For me, the improvements have been significant in many ways; no more sensitivity to bright light, colors more vibrant, distinguishing grayscale better even at night (along with better night vision), easier computer screen reading, increased peripheral vision, distance visual acuity improving from 20/200 to 20/30 without glasses, and color contrast improving along with visual field improvements. These improvements are shockingly good considering that I have only finished two of the five on-site treatments. You owe it to yourself to seriously consider Netra's treatments.” Barry Virginia, USA "The Doctor combines the best of Chinese and Indian medicine to heal issues for which there appear to be no other solutions. In my case, I presented with glaucoma with 20/30 vision and a small loss in peripheral vision. The doctor restored my vision to 20/15 and improved the visual field in my left eye so that it is normal and the visual field in my right eye so that it is almost normal." Martin New Jersey, USA " I was diagnosed as Wet Macular Degeneration in my right eye three months ago and my ophthalmologist recommended me to receive regular eye injection to have the symptom "controlled", but I determined to find a treatment to "heal" my eye problem instead. I received an intensive holistic treatment in the Institute and at the end of my first treatment course, I was glad that there was no more macular edema in my right eye. Moreover, my visual acuity for both eyes, night vision, as well as peripheral visual field were improved a lot." Louisa New Jersey, USA " Dr. Sai is god-sent for me, when i had developed a vision issue that doesnt' have a "name" in western medicine. I feel lucky to stumble on this gem searching for alternative treatments. Dr. Sai is not only an acupuncturist but has deep knowledge of traditional treatment styles in chinese, tibetan and ayurvedic medicines. Under his care, i am almost back up there doing my normal lifestyle." Raj New Jersey, USA " In just about 4 weeks of starting the treatment at Netra Eye Institute, my vision has greatly improved from just seeing fingers at 2 feet to seeing a few lines on the vision chart. My macular edema has completely disappeared, and my IOP has stabilized from 32 to 9. Before the treatment, I was walking like a zombie with tonnel vision. After the treatment, I am now able to move around the house with ease and run up and down the stairs like normal. My blurriness had considerably reduced, and my night vision, color, and depth perception had greatly improved." Daniel New Jersey, USA Meet the Founder and Director Dr. Saikumar Gandapodi is the Founder and Director of Netra Eye Institute, where he leads a holistic, integrative approach to vision care. He holds a Master’s degree in Traditional Oriental Medicine from Pacific College of Health and Science and a doctoral degree from Five Branches University, reflecting his extensive academic training in evidence-informed traditional medicine. In addition to his formal education, Dr. Gandapodi received advanced clinical training in India, where he worked in eye hospitals and gained hands-on experience in ocular diagnostics and modern ophthalmic imaging technologies. This exposure to contemporary ophthalmic diagnostics, combined with his training in traditional medical sciences, shaped his integrative perspective on eye health. Drawing on this multidisciplinary background, Dr. Gandapodi developed Netra Restoration Therapy (NRT) — a physiology-based eye care program designed to support retinal and optic nerve health by improving ocular blood flow, enhancing neuroretinal resilience, regulating inflammation, and reducing oxidative stress. Through NRT, Dr. Gandapodi is committed to providing patients with a science-guided, holistic pathway aimed at supporting long-term retinal and optic nerve health. special financing through There’s a simpler and more flexible way to manage the cost of your vision care. Netra Eye Institute proudly accepts the CareCredit® credit card—North America’s leading healthcare financing option. CareCredit allows you to move forward with your NRT treatment right away and pay over time through convenient monthly payments designed to fit your budget. CareCredit helps make clearer vision more accessible, without delaying your care. Frequently Asked Questions This FAQ section answers common questions about care at Netra Eye Institute . It explains our Integrative Eye Care approach, including Netra Restoration Therapy (NRT), what to expect during evaluations, and how our treatments support long-term eye health—helping you make informed decisions about your vision. 1. Where is Netra Eye Institute located, and are there any branch offices available? Netra Eye Institute is based in South Plainfield, New Jersey, and currently does not have any branch locations. 2. What is Netra Restoration Therapy (NRT)? Netra Restoration Therapy (NRT) is a holistic eye-care approach based on TCM and Ayurvedic Ophthalmology that integrates acupuncture, herbal medicine, and supportive lifestyle guidance. NRT focuses on improving ocular circulation, regulating inflammation, and supporting the health of the retina, optic nerve, and visual system as a whole. It is designed to complement conventional eye care by addressing functional imbalances that may contribute to chronic or degenerative eye conditions. 3. What is the success rate of Netra Restoration Therapy? Netra Restoration Therapy has a very high success rate. For most conditions, patients begin to notice marked improvement in their vision within 7 days of treatment. 4. Do you accept my health insurance for the eye treatments? Netra Restoration Therapy (NRT) is a holistic approach rooted in TCM  and Ayurvedic Ophthalmology , incorporating acupuncture and herbal supplements. Holistic therapies, including acupuncture and herbal medicine for eye conditions, are not covered by health insurance. 5. Why Netra Restoration Therapy is not covered by my insurance? Netra Restoration Therapy (NRT) is a holistic approach rooted in TCM  and Ayurvedic Ophthalmology , incorporating acupuncture and herbal supplements. Holistic therapies, including acupuncture and herbal medicine for eye conditions, are not covered by health insurance. 6. Why is my eye doctor not aware of Netra Eye Institute and Netra Restoration Therapy? Your eye doctor may not be aware of Netra and its holistic eye treatments but should be aware on why Vascular Dysregulation, Neurotrophin Deprivation, Neuroprotection, Cytokine Dysregulation, Ocular Inflammation, Oxidative Stress and Ferroptosis are the root cause of vision loss and multiple recent research studies have shown these factors leads to most eye disorders. If they are not aware of these factors you may want to bridge the gap, by providing your doctor with the research articles given under our References section. 7. How long are the treatments? The duration of treatment might vary from 2 to 4 weeks depending on the eye condition and its severity. Degenerative eye conditions usually require followup treatments. 8. What eye conditons do you treat? Please see our conditions treated section to see the complete list of eye disorders we treat. 9. Do you offer treatment for children with vision problems? Yes. Most sought condition in children is myopia (nearsightedness) and Keratoconus. Netra Restoration Therapy helps stop progression and impove vision. 10. Do I have to come in in-person for treatments? Yes. Patients have to come in to our office for treatments. 11. Can I use my HSA, FSA or HRA for payments? Yes. Acupuncture is an eligible expense with a flexible spending account (FSA), health savings account (HSA) or health reimbursement arrangement (HRA).
